action.description:
Introduced by Senators Habush Sinykin, Carpenter, Hesselbein, Dassler-Alfheim, Ratcliff, Larson, Spreitzer, Pfaff, Keyeski, L. Johnson and Wall; 
cosponsored by Representatives Doyle, Sinicki, McCarville, Andraca, Johnson, Anderson, Udell, DeSmidt, Emerson, Bare, Hysell, Stroud, Arney, Joers, Miresse, Fitzgerald, Neubauer, Roe and Stubbs
